diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Alex. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi Alex. I forgot my password and I'm trying to log in. Can you help me reset it?
[Agent] Absolutely, I can help with that. I know password resets can be stressful, especially if you're in the middle of an event. Let's get you back in. Could you share your UID?
[Caller] Yes, 606778231.
[Agent] Got it, David. Let me pull up the account. For security, I need to verify ownership before making changes. The fastest path is a one-time code to your email on file at dbrown at email dot com. Do you still have access to that inbox?
[Caller] Yes, I do.
[Agent] Perfect, sending now. When you see it, just read the six digits back.
[Caller] OK, got it. 758204.
[Agent] Verified. Before I reset, quick heads-up — resetting the password will sign you out everywhere, and you'll need to sign in again on your Windows PC. You'll receive a reset link at the same email; it's valid for 30 minutes. For peace of mind, I'd recommend enabling two-factor on the HoYoverse account once you're back in. Want me to email you a walkthrough along with the reset?
[Caller] That'd be great, thanks.
[Agent] Done. Reset link and 2FA walkthrough both sent. Is there anything else I can check on the account while we're here?
[Caller] Actually, yeah — I'm Adventure Rank 30 and I want to know when World Level 4 kicks in.
[Agent] World Level Ascension becomes available at Adventure Rank 35, so you're 5 levels away. You'll get an in-game notification when you're eligible to ascend.
[Caller] Perfect, thank you.
[Agent] You're very welcome, David. Have a great day, and enjoy Teyvat!
